final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending post, city skyline at dusk.

Style/medium: photojournalistic documentary style, shot on mobile phone, photorealistic
Composition: wide horizontal frame, 16:9, foreground pedestrians in motion, distant skyscrapers, generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: city skyline at dusk with neon lights coming on, hurrying pedestrians, tall buildings reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: urban street at dusk, neon signs gradually lighting up, distant high-rises catching last sunlight
Lighting/mood: dramatic light-shadow contrast, warm sunset glow on buildings, neon beginning to illuminate, golden hour transitioning to blue hour
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: sharp details, strong sense of real on-location presence
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" · "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" · "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: main title "城市里的安静时刻" in bold/modern typeface at prominent position; subtitle "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" below; watermark "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" at bottom-right corner
Avoid:
